intentSynonyms: show me my projects in vercel
see all my projects in vercel
list all vercel projects in vercel
description: List all projects in the current Vercel team/account. Returns project names, frameworks, Git repos, and deployment status. Supports pagination.

limit.description: Maximum number of projects to return (default 20, max 100)

from.description: Pagination cursor — project ID to start from (from previous response)
